summary: This is a very brief announcement post where Joel mentions ongoing work on CityDesk and introduces a new discussion board for the Joel on Software community. He notes the board isn't finished yet and warns that early messages may be deleted when the final version launches.
key_points: Joel is actively developing CityDesk, Fog Creek's content management product
A new community discussion board is being launched at discuss.fogcreek.com
The board is released in an incomplete state, inviting early participation despite impermanence
money_quotes: It's not totally done yet, but feel free to start playing with it.
Messages you post will probably disappear in a couple of days when I put up the final version.
key_insight: A minor announcement post reflecting Joel's willingness to ship early and iterate, even at the cost of losing early user-generated content.
